name: Pluto TV Auto Tuner
description: Prepare Pluto TV M3U tuner and XMLTV guide setup information for Jellyfin.
overview: Hosted Pluto M3U/XMLTV setup helper with optional Docker command generation.

versions.changelog: Initial MVP with hosted no-Docker setup, optional Docker helper command generation, bounded URL validation, manual setup fallback, and disabled native mode that does not fake Pluto data.
